main.description: A clients registry entry stored under the client's verified id. Identity is a bus-minted ULID (the primary id and registry key); display_name is the human label, unique by convention (ADR-0019).

id.description: Client's verified identity: a bus-minted ULID; must equal the registry key.

display_name.description: Human-readable label minted with the credential; unique by convention, not by the bus.

epoch.description: Protocol epoch the client connected under.

sdk.description: SDK name and version that wrote the entry.
